contents.contents: A license is allowed if Fedora determines that the license is a free software / open source license. At a high level, the inquiry involves determining whether the license provides software freedom, and (equivalently) making sure that the license does not place burdens on users' exercise of its permissions that are inconsistent with evolving community norms and traditions around what is acceptable in a free software / open source license. See below for more on the history of Fedora licensing policy.

contents.contents: Eine Lizenz ist freigegeben, wenn sie nach fachlicher und juristischer Prüfung seitens Open CoDE sowohl der Open Source Definition (gemäß Definition der Open Source Initiative [extern]) entspricht und darüber hinaus keine für die Öffentliche Verwaltung erkennbaren Schwierigkeiten birgt. Außer in Ausnahmefällen ist nicht zu erwarten, dass einmal freigegebene Lizenzen deklassifiziert werden.

contents.content: such software and databases are provided "as-is" and the copyright holder makes no representations or warranties of any kind, either express or implied, including, but not limited to, the implied warranties of merchantability and fitness for a particular purpose, and no representations or warranties of any kind, either express or implied, regarding the use of such software or databases or their related documentation. Such representations and warranties include, but are not limited to, representations and warranties of commercial applicability and fitness for a particular purpose, as well as representations and warranties regarding non-infringement of patents, copyrights, trademarks, and other rights of third parties arising from the use of the software and databases and related documentation.
The names Princeton University and Princeton shall not be used in advertising for the software or database and their distribution.
The copyright in such software and databases and their associated documentation shall be retained by the copyright holder, and Licensee agrees to it.

permissions._str:
Description: Related documentation for software and databases should be treated in the same way as software and databases.
Actions:
- Ol Use the obtained source code without modification (Use the fetched code as it is.)
- Ol Using Modified Source Code
- Ol Use the retrieved object code (Use the fetched code as it is.)
- Ol Use the object code generated from the modified source code
- Ol Use the retrieved executable (Use the obtained executable as is.)
- Ol Use the executable generated from the modified source code
- Ol To use the acquired database without modification (Use the fetched database as it is.)
- Ol Using a modified database

Conditions: None

contents.description: Use the fetched code as it is.
contents.name: Use the obtained source code without modification

contents.description: Use the fetched code as it is.
contents.name: Use the retrieved object code
Use the object code generated from the modified source code

contents.description: Use the obtained executable as is.
contents.name: Use the retrieved executable
Use the executable generated from the modified source code

contents.description: Use the fetched database as it is.
contents.name: To use the acquired database without modification

permissions.description: Related documentation for software and databases should be treated in the same way as software and databases.

permissions._str:
Description: Copyright Notice: "WordNet <version> Copyright <year> by Princeton University. All rights reserved."-Software and database documentation is treated in the same way as software and databases.
Actions:
- Ol Modify the obtained source code.
- Ol Distribute the obtained source code without modification (Redistribute the code as it was obtained)
- Ol Distribute the obtained object code (Redistribute the code as it was obtained)
- Ol Distribution of Modified Source Code
- Ol Distribute the object code generated from the modified source code
- Ol Distribute the obtained executable (Redistribute the obtained executable as-is)
- Ol Distribute the executable generated from the modified source code
- Ol Modify the retrieved database
- Ol Distribute the acquired database without modification (Redistribute the acquired database as is)
- Ol Distribute the modified database

Conditions:
Ol OBLIGATION: Include a copyright notice, list of terms and conditions, and disclaimer included in the license

contents.description: Redistribute the code as it was obtained
contents.name: Distribute the obtained source code without modification

contents.description: Redistribute the code as it was obtained

Distribute the object code generated from the modified source code
Distribute the executable generated from the modified source code

contents.description: Redistribute the acquired database as is

Include a copyright notice, list of terms and conditions, and disclaimer included in the license
